title: lycopodium pumilum var. bryoides
intro: Lycopodium pumilum var. bryoides, also known as club moss, is a type of vascular plant that belongs to the club moss family (Lycopodiaceae) and is native to the tropical and subtropical regions of the world. Traditionally, Lycopodium pumilum var. bryoides has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties, which make it useful in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The health benefits of Lycopodium pumilum var. bryoides include its ability to relieve coughs and congestion, reduce fever, and support immune function. In herbal preparations, Lycopodium pumilum var. bryoides is often combined with other herbs to create tonics, teas, and expectorant formulas that can be used to promote respiratory health and well-being.
